utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Tiger ! Dragon ! Iceberg ! ! Joseph , did you even study at all last night ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_did you even study at all last night ?
1_did you even study at all last night ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: G ... sharp ? Have you been studying the real names of the chords ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_Have you been studying the real names of the chords ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What ? ! I did not touch a guitar !

emotion_cause.span: 5_Have you been studying the real names of the chords ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No , but you are questioning my method !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No , I am not questioning it , I am saying it is stupid ! What ? !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You know none of my other student thought I was stupid .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , well , you know maybe you just need to try a little harder !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Look , maybe I need to try a real teacher !

emotion_cause.span: 12_maybe you just need to try a little harder !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Andy Cooper , he teaches guitar and look ooh , there is a nice picture of him with a little kid and the kid got a guitar ! ! ! ! ! !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Fine ! You go learn from your qualified instructor ! But do not come crying to me when everyone sick and tired of hearing you play Bad , Bad Leroy Brown ! !

emotion_cause.span: 17_You go learn from your qualified instructor !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: " Baddest man in the whole damn town . "
